arts.ttl: ‘It’s so depressing’: Manchester United fans open up on club’s malaise
arts.sum: Liverpool host a disjointed side bereft of form but United supporters are keen to get behind Ruben Amorim Manchester United’s recent trips to Liverpool have been gruesome occasions for their supporters. It has been nine years since United last won away at their fiercest rivals and they have failed to score in their past five visits to Anfield, losing 4-0 and 7-0 in that time. United fans could be forgiven for plunging to new levels of pessimism for this latest mission to Merseyside, given current circumstances. While Liverpool are streaking clear at the Premier League summit via a seamless transition under Arne Slot, United are staring down the barrel of a fifth successive defeat and a seventh in 12 games under Ruben Amorim. Continue reading...
